dash.analytics.qa.heading: Quality Assurance Analysis
dash.analytics.qa.no-promo-activity: No promotional QR activity was recorded in this period, so scan discipline and invalid use cannot be evaluated.
dash.analytics.qa.scan-normal: QA: Promo scanning appears within a normal range for this period. Roughly {percent}% of "promo QR shown" events led to a recorded redemption.
dash.analytics.qa.scan-low: ⚠ QA: Scan discipline appears low in this period (≈ {percent}%). Promotions were shown {armed} times, with {redeems} redemptions. Consider reinforcing the in-store process so that cashiers always scan promotion codes at checkout.
dash.analytics.qa.scan-over-100: ⚠ QA: Reported scan discipline is above 100% (≈ {percent}%). This typically indicates that some redemptions in this period originate from promo QR shown outside the selected reporting window.
dash.analytics.qa.invalid-no-attempts: No redemption attempts were recorded in this period, so invalid use cannot be evaluated.
dash.analytics.qa.invalid-elevated: ⚠ QA: Invalid redemption attempts are elevated in this period (≈ {percent}% of {tries} redemption tries). This may indicate repeated use of expired or already-used codes, or attempts outside the valid campaign window.
dash.analytics.qa.invalid-normal: QA: Invalid redemption attempts look normal for this period (≈ {percent}% of {tries} redemption tries).
dash.analytics.qa.cashier-coverage-missi: Cashier confirmation coverage could not be evaluated because there were no recorded redemptions in this period.
dash.analytics.qa.cashier-coverage-low: ⚠ QA: Cashier confirmations cover only about {percent}% of recorded redemptions ({confirmations} of {redeems}). This may indicate that some discounts are applied without completing the full promo QR flow at the register.
dash.analytics.qa.cashier-coverage-ok: QA: Cashier confirmations cover most recorded redemptions (≈ {percent}%, {confirmations} of {redeems}), which is consistent with a healthy scan-and-redeem process.
dash.analytics.qa.customer-coverage-miss: Customer confirmation coverage could not be evaluated because no promo QR was shown in this period.
dash.analytics.qa.customer-coverage-low: ⚠ QA: Customer confirmations are low compared to promo QR shown (≈ {percent}%, {confirmations} from {armed}). This may indicate that promotions are not consistently converted into a completed redeem experience.
dash.analytics.qa.customer-coverage-ok: QA: Customer confirmations are within an expected range for this period (≈ {percent}%, {confirmations} from {armed}).
dash.analytics.qa.unknown: Quality Assurance status could not be fully evaluated for this period.
dash.analytics.qa.scan-borderline: Promo scanning is slightly below the preferred range. Monitoring is recommended.
